推荐场景: 团队会议｜找准打断时机
60秒任务: 「礼貌打断」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Sorry to jump in, but ___.（礼貌打断）
Can I pause you there for a second?（暂停发言）
Before we move on, can I ask ___?（推进前提问）
I don’t mean to interrupt, but this affects ___.（说明打断原因）
Could I quickly clarify one point?（快速澄清）
Just to make sure I understood, ___.（复述确认）
May I add something before we decide?（决策前补充）
Can we come back to the previous point?（回到上一点）
I think we may be talking past each other.（指出沟通错位）
Let’s slow down for a moment.（放慢节奏）
That’s important, but we’re missing ___.（指出遗漏）
Can I challenge that assumption?（挑战假设）
Please continue after this question.（打断后交还话语权）
I’ll be brief.（保证简短）
Thanks, go ahead.（让对方继续）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: interruption, clarification, point, assumption, question, previous point, decision, discussion
Verbs: interrupt, pause, clarify, challenge, continue, understand, move on, come back
Adjectives / Status: brief, polite, relevant, previous, unclear, important
Time / Place: for a second, before we move on, in the meeting, on the call
Chunks: jump in, pause you there, talking past each other, clarify one point, go ahead
